contract_claim: AGENTS.md lists 'adapter-ruby' as missing from the packages/ workspace modules. The shadow docs (prepare-pack.js, release-dry-run.sh, install-claude-mcp.sh) consistently reference adapter-ruby as a workspace package, but AGENTS.md's list of packages omits it. The listed packages are: @debugmcp/shared, adapter-mock, adapter-python, adapter-javascript, adapter-rust, adapter-go, adapter-java, adapter-dotnet, mcp-debugger. adapter-ruby is missing.
observed_behavior: Hardcoded workspace list (L32): shared, adapter-dotnet, adapter-go, adapter-java, adapter-javascript, adapter-python, adapter-mock, adapter-ruby, adapter-rust
